title: sida mairei
intro: Sida mairei, also known as the Indian milk privet, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida mairei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
